title: How to update your iPhone software
description: Learn how to keep your Apple iPhone secure and up-to-date with the latest software patches.

steps.title: Connect to Wi-Fi and charger
steps.body: Plug your phone into power and make sure you are connected to a home Wi-Fi network. Updates take a lot of battery power and internet data.

steps.title: Open the Settings app
steps.body: Find the grey gear icon on your home screen and tap it.

steps.title: Go to General settings
steps.body: Scroll down a little bit and tap on the option that says 'General'.

steps.title: Tap Software Update
steps.body: Tap the second option from the top called 'Software Update'. The phone will check if an update is available.

steps.title: Download and Install
steps.body: If an update is listed, tap 'Download and Install'. Enter your phone passcode if prompted, and the screen will restart once the update is done.

glossary.definition: A package of fixes, security updates, and new features provided by the phone manufacturer (Apple) to keep your device working well.
The numbers you type on your lock screen to unlock your phone.
